integrity.description: The agent used the Rancher web UI to perform the audit and deletions as instructed, rather than bypassing it entirely with terminal kubectl commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Rancher web interface in a browser for navigating and deleting resources.

integrity.description: The agent only modified resources in the 'platform-services' namespace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The namespace selector in the Rancher UI is clearly set to 'platform-services' during the deletion steps, with no evidence of deleting resources in 'default' or 'kube-system'.

integrity.description: The agent actually executed the deletions rather than just inspecting the resources.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of deletion confirmation dialogs, 'deleted' toast notifications in the Rancher UI, or the explicit absence of the orphaned resources in the final resource lists.
